---
name: Report Bugs & Feature Enhancement requests
about: Describe this issue template's purpose here.
title: ''
labels: bug, enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
Provide a detailed description the issue you are facing 

### Actual Behaviour
Explain how the issue is currently affecting the behaviour of the functionality

### Expected Behaviour
Explain how the functionality should behave if there were no issues

### Reproduction Steps
Provide an ordered list of the steps to take to effectively reproduce the issue

### Evidence & Attachment
Provide a screenshot or videos describing the issue, showing any errors or any files that can aid in identifying the issue
